- Right eye needs to move DOWN by 1 (from rows 44-48 to 49-53) and RIGHT by 1 (from cols 34-38 to 39-43)
But when I press LEFT, both eyes move left. When I press RIGHT, both eyes move right. When I press UP, both eyes move up. When I press DOWN, both eyes move down.
So to get the right eye to rows 49-53, I need to press DOWN. But this would also move the left eye down from rows 49-53 to 54-58.
Then I need to press UP to move the left eye back up to rows 49-53. But this would also move the right eye up from rows 49-53 to 44-48.
This is a problem. The eyes seem to move together, so I can't independently control them.
Wait, but I've seen the eyes at different rows before. For example, the initial position has both eyes at rows 49-53. But when I press UP, the left eye moves to rows 44-48 and the right eye stays at rows 49-53 (or vice versa). This suggests that the eyes can move independently to some extent.
